name: MENARCHE
label: BA-1 Age at first menstrual period (bottom-coded)
universe: Applicable for all respondents
notes: This variable has been modified for public use, and the original variable is accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: CURRPREG
label: Whether R is currently pregnant (at time of interview) (computed in FC B-3)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: LASTPREG
label: How recent was R's last pregnancy
universe: Applicable if R has ever been pregnant (PREGNUM > 0)
notes: This variable has been created for public use, and the original source variables are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: BIRTH1
label: Whether R had a live birth in the last 12 months
universe: Applicable if R has had at least 1 live birth (PARITY > 0)
notes: This variable has been created for public use, and the original source variables are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: OTHERKID
label: BD-1 Have any other nonbio children ever lived w/R under her care and responsibility
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

name: NOTHRKID
label: BD-2 Number of other nonbio children who ever llived w/R under her care and responsibility
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological children as ever living with her under her care and responsibility (BD-1 OTHERKID = 1)

name: NBKIDLIV
label: BD-3 Number of these other nonbio children currently living with R (top-coded)
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological children as ever living with her under her care and responsibility (BD-1 OTHERKID = 1)
notes: This variable has been modified for public use, and the original variable is accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: NBKIDSEX_01
label: BD-5 Is other nonbio child living w/R male or female - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

name: NBKIDREL_01
label: BD-6 Relationship of other nonbio child to R when began living with R - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

distribution.label: The child of a blood relative
The child of a relative by marriage
Related to you in some other way
Unrelated to you previously in any way

name: NBKDAGE_01
label: BD-7 Age of other nonbio child when began living with R - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

name: ADPTNBKD_01
label: BD-8 Did R legally adopt this nonbio child - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

name: TRYADOPT_01
label: BD-9 Is R trying to adopt this nonbio child - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_01 = 3)

name: TRYEITHR_01
label: BD-10 Is R trying to adopt or become guardian for this nonbio child - 1st child
universe: Applicable if R reported neither adopting or becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_01 = 5)

name: NBKIDFOS_01
label: BD-11 Was this nonbio child a foster or related child placed w/R by Soc Svcs - 1st child
universe: Applicable if this child currently living with R is neither a stepchild nor a partner's child (BD-6 NBKIDREL_01 NE 1 or 5)

name: NBKIDSEX_02
label: BD-5 Is other nonbio child living w/R male or female - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 1)

name: NBKIDREL_02
label: BD-6 Relationship of other nonbio child to R when began living with R - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

distribution.label: The child of a blood relative
The child of a relative by marriage
Related to you in some other way
Unrelated to you previously in any way

name: NBKDAGE_02
label: BD-7 Age of other nonbio child when began living with R - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 1)

name: ADPTNBKD_02
label: BD-8 Did R legally adopt this nonbio child - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 1)

name: TRYADOPT_02
label: BD-9 Is R trying to adopt this nonbio child - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_02 = 3)

name: TRYEITHR_02
label: BD-10 Is R trying to adopt or become guardian for this nonbio child - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if R reported neither adopting or becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_02 = 5)

name: NBKIDFOS_02
label: BD-11 Was this nonbio child a foster or related child placed w/R by Soc Svcs - 2nd child
universe: Applicable if this child currently living with R is neither a stepchild nor a partner's child (BD-6 NBKIDREL_02 NE 1 or 5)

name: NBKIDSEX_03
label: BD-5 Is other nonbio child living w/R male or female - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 2 nonbiological children as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 2)

name: NBKIDREL_03
label: BD-6 Relationship of other nonbio child to R when began living with R - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported any nonbiological child as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 0)

distribution.label: The child of a blood relative
Related to you in some other way
Unrelated to you previously in any way

name: NBKDAGE_03
label: BD-7 Age of other nonbio child when began living with R - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 2 nonbiological children as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 2)

name: ADPTNBKD_03
label: BD-8 Did R legally adopt this nonbio child - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 2 nonbiological children as living with her currently (BD-3 NBKIDLIV > 2)

name: TRYADOPT_03
label: BD-9 Is R trying to adopt this nonbio child - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_03 = 3)

name: TRYEITHR_03
label: BD-10 Is R trying to adopt or become guardian for this nonbio child - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if R reported neither adopting or becoming legal guardian for this child (BD-8 ADPTNBKID_03 = 5)

name: NBKIDFOS_03
label: BD-11 Was this nonbio child a foster or related child placed w/R by Soc Svcs - 3rd child
universe: Applicable if this child currently living with R is neither a stepchild nor a partner's child (BD-6 NBKIDREL_03 NE 1 or 5)

name: EVERADOPT
label: BD-12 R has ever legally adopted a child
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

name: BD_ADOPT
label: R's experience with adoption (based on BD series) (computed in FC B-47)
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

distribution.label: No, has not adopted a child

name: SEEKADPT
label: BE-1 R Currently Seeking to Adopt
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

name: CONTAGEM
label: BE-2 Has R Taken Specific Steps to Adopt
universe: Applicable if R is currently seeking to adopt a(nother) child (BE-1 SEEKADPT = 1)

name: TRYLONG
label: BE-3 How Long R Has Been Seeking to Adopt
universe: Applicable if R is taking specific steps to adopt (BE-2 CONTAGEM = 1)

name: KNOWADPT
label: BE-4 Is R Seeking to Adopt Child She Knows
universe: Applicable if R is currently seeking to adopt a(nother) child (BE-1 SEEKADPT = 1)

name: EVWNTANO
label: BF-1 R Ever Considered Adopting a Child
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18) and R is not currently seeking to adopt a(nother) child (BE-1 SEEKADPT = 5, DK/RF)

name: EVCONTAG
label: BF-2 R Ever Took Specific Steps to Adopt a Child
universe: Applicable if R has ever considered adopting a(nother) child (BF-1 EVWNTANO = 1)

name: TURNDOWN
label: BF-3 R Ever Turned Down for Adoption
universe: Applicable if R took specific steps to adopt in the past (BF-2 EVCONTAG = 1)

name: YQUITTRY
label: BF-4 Reason R Quit Trying to Adopt
universe: Applicable if R decided not to pursue adoption any further (BF-3 TURNDOWN = 3)

name: HRDEMBRYO
label: BF-5 R has heard of frozen embryo donation or adoption
universe: Applicable if R is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

name: SRCEMBRYO_1
label: BF-6 Where R heard about embryo adoption or donation - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R reported hearing of embryo adoption or donation (BF-5 HRDEMBRYO = 1)

name: SRCEMBRYO_2
label: BF-6 Where R heard about embryo adoption or donation - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported hearing of embryo adoption or donation from at least 2 sources (see BF-5 SRCEMBRYO_1)

name: SRCEMBRYO_3
label: BF-6 Where R heard about embryo adoption or donation - 3rd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported hearing of embryo adoption or donation from at least 3 sources (see BF-5 SRCEMBRYO_1)

name: SRCEMBRYO_4
label: BF-6 Where R heard about embryo adoption or donation - 4th mention
universe: Applicable if R reported hearing of embryo adoption or donation from at least 4 sources (see BF-5 SRCEMBRYO_1)

name: SRCEMBRYO_5
label: BF-6 Where R heard about embryo adoption or donation - 5th mention
universe: Applicable if R reported hearing of embryo adoption or donation from at least 5 sources (see BF-5 SRCEMBRYO_1)
